rationale: Empirical sweep at 8b664359 is fully green. `go build ./...` clean. `go test -count=1 ./internal/approve ./internal/executor ./internal/complete ./internal/lifecycle` all ok. All 11 named tests (TestApproveImpl_OrphanRefuses, _OrphanInfraErrorFailsClosed, _OrphanExemptions, _DeletedBranchNoRefusal, _HatchDoesNotBypassOrphan, _AdvisorySlotNaming, _ObligationBackstop, _CorruptPlanRefuses, _PassesAfterOrphanSettled, _UnreadableRefStoreAbortsPreScan, _WorktreeEnumRefusesDespiteProbeMiss) exist and PASS individually with -run, subtests included. TestApproveImplCallOrder (AC4 anchor referencing ScanOrphanedClosedBeads) passes, confirming gate placement. Fences all empty: no BranchExistsE hits, no show-ref hits in internal/, no gitutil diff vs main. gofmt -l clean, go vet clean, golangci-lint 0 issues. `git diff --stat 075fd630..8b664359` touches exactly the 3 expected files (impl.go +273, impl_test.go +108/-19, orphan_gate_test.go +708), matching the BRIEF's stated blast radius exactly. `git status --porcelain` shows only the untracked reviews/ scratch dir I created — no tracked file was modified. Inspected deviation C's diff directly: TestApproveImpl_NoCommitsNoBeads now asserts 'plan bead list could not be read' + recovery line + zero FinalizeEpic calls, which is a faithful, well-commented, spec-mandated tightening (R3 fail-closed intercepts before the CommitCount preflight) — not a masked regression. No empirical red flags found.
findings: All 11 named tests present and pass individually (verified via -run with -v, all subtests PASS)
TestApproveImplCallOrder (AC4 anchor) passes — confirms runOrphanObligationGate placement pinned via AST, referencing lifecycle.ScanOrphanedClosedBeads
git diff main -- internal/gitutil/ — empty (no gitutil change)
git diff --stat 075fd630..8b664359 — exactly 3 files: impl.go (+273), impl_test.go (+108/-19), orphan_gate_test.go (+708 new); totals 1070+/19- matching BRIEF exactly
git status --porcelain — only the untracked reviews/spec-115-bead2/ scratch dir; no tracked file modified, working tree otherwise clean

Deviation A (fixture): confirmed writePlanWithBeads(...) added to prior-passing tests (e.g. TestApproveImpl_MockExecutorNoBD, TestApproveImplOverrideRecordsToEpic) — mechanical accommodation for Leg 3 now reading plan.md; assertions unchanged in those tests — legitimate.

Deviation C (the key assertion change): read the actual diff hunk for TestApproveImpl_NoCommitsNoBeads. Old assertion 'no commits beyond main' replaced with 'plan bead list could not be read' + guard.HasFinalRecoveryLine + explicit assertion that FinalizeEpic made 0 calls. This is a correct, spec-mandated tightening per R3's fail-closed design (a missing plan.md must never be silently tolerated and must intercept before the CommitCount preflight) — not a masked regression. The updated test still proves FinalizeEpic never runs on this degenerate input, which is the property that matters.
